title: Hearty Portuguese Bean Stew
description: A rich and comforting stew made with tender beans, soft plush, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add plush and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add stew, tomato paste, beef broth, red wine, and thyme.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Add beans and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
